title: Satellite Engineering
shortSummary: Designing satellites that work — from CubeSats to Starlink mega-constellations, covering bus design, payloads, orbits, and mass-production approaches.
whyItMatters: The satellite industry generates over $280 billion annually. SpaceX's Starlink constellation alone has redefined what is possible with mass-produced satellites. Understanding satellite bus design, payload integration, and constellation management is essential for the commercial space economy.
